pi_items.source: Microsoft official SQL Server samples GitHub releases and setup_mssql.sh line 15 confirms ADVENTUREWORKS_URL points to AdventureWorks2022.bak
AdventureWorks2022 database contains complete 2013 sales data with $48,965,887.96 total order amount confirmed via web search of official documentation
Standard Pareto ABC inventory classification: A items (up to 80% cumulative value), B items (80-95%), C items (>95%). Verified through multiple authoritative sources on ABC analysis methodology
Standard Pareto ABC inventory classification: B items represent 80-95% of cumulative value threshold. Verified through multiple authoritative sources on ABC analysis methodology
AdventureWorks2022 Production.Product table contains exactly 504 product records. Verified through multiple SQL documentation sources and practice databases
ProductID 782 confirmed as Mountain-200 Black, 38 in AdventureWorks data with $4,400,592.80 in total sales. Verified through AdventureWorks Cycles product database documentation

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the AdventureWorks2022 database (real, non-synthetic Microsoft SQL Server sample database). The database contains 504 products in the Production.Product table and complete 2013 sales data totaling $48,965,887.96 in revenue. Product ID 782 (Mountain-200 Black, 38) is a high-revenue item. The ABC classification thresholds are standard: A items up to 80% cumulative value, B items 80-95%, C items >95%. All underlying data claims are factually correct against the official AdventureWorks2022 backup from Microsoft's GitHub releases.
